display_name: gentle bow with flower and hair sway

forbid: frame-to-frame body shrink unrelated to bow projection
redrawn head smaller or larger than adjacent frames
dress or sleeve length changing without pose cause
cropped hair, flowers, hands, sleeves, dress, or hem

phases.name: standing_ready
phases.hands: separate at sides or beginning to move inward

phases.name: hands_move_inward
phases.body: upright with tiny anticipation only; no body shrink

phases.name: hands_join_start_bow
phases.body: torso begins bending forward; visible height starts decreasing by projection

phases.name: bow_down_a
phases.body: head and torso continue down; bottom anchor stable

phases.name: bow_down_b
phases.body: deeper bow; dress compresses only by projection
phases.hands: joined and partly covered by sleeves

phases.name: deep_bow_hold_b
phases.body: deep bow hold with hair/flower secondary sway

hard_requirements: one consistent character, same local proportions in every frame
visible height decreases during bow-down, holds around the deepest bow, then increases during rise
hands move from separate to joined during the bow and separate again during recovery
hair ornaments and flowers sway secondarily but remain same size and fully visible
every frame keeps empty safe margin on all four sides inside its atlas cell
reject_if: any frame clips the top hair/flowers or bottom dress/feet
frame 0 to frame 1 changes body length without a bow cause
hands remain in the same state for the entire action
hands are joined during standing recovery frames 12-15
standing frames 12-15 have cropped top accessories
body appears to shrink instead of rotate/bend
character scale or local proportions drift frame-to-frame
